generation_note: Generated from Bulbapedia individual card page expansion metadata and release-information text. Exact set/number match is required; finish truth is emitted only for explicit finish/stamp/logo wording.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information stamp/logo variant
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped stamp/logo variant. Evidence: A version of the Ancient Origins print with a stamp in the lower right corner of the artwork was given to customers who bought an Eevee Build-A-Bear online or at Build-A-Bear stores, starting September 1, 2016.
